subcategory: 3D playing card with canvas reveal animation
use_cases: Interactive card games and digital decks with animated reveals
Digital collectibles showcase with 3D card displays
E-commerce product cards for card game merchandise
ai_summary: A 3D playing card component built with React Three Fiber featuring animated canvas reveal effects with dot matrix shader logic. The component supports customizable colors, animation speeds, and gradient overlays, making it suitable for gaming interfaces, digital collectible platforms, or interactive media applications requiring premium card-based visual displays.
